Unit tests for the launcher menu layer and build script for launcher app tests.


## Files
- **[test_launcher_menu_layer.c](test_launcher_menu_layer.c.md)**: Unit tests for the launcher menu layer in the Pebble firmware, including tests for app icons and glances.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for the Pebble firmware launcher app tests, specifying source files and dependencies.
